light.comment: Page background light theme — iOS system gray 6

low.comment: Lowest surface — modals beneath sheets, deepest containers

high.comment: Alias for surface.default — historical name; FitUI components + CSS prototypes still reference it. New code should prefer surface.default. A dedicated elevated surface, if needed, will land as surface.elevated.

higher.comment: Elevation step — nested card within card, input inside card on sheet (one step above default)

primary.comment: Primary brand blue (constant — brand mark unchanged across themes)

secondary.comment: Secondary brand teal (constant — used for selection / accent / brand-tint surfaces)

tertiary.comment: Muted text — captions, meta, time stamps

error.comment: Error message text — light theme uses darker red for WCAG contrast on white

error-subtle.comment: Error banner / faint surface — used for inline validation banners

error-tinted.comment: Error highlight — pill, chip, badge bg with stronger presence than subtle

success-subtle.comment: Success faint surface — confirmation banner, paid-status row

success-tinted.comment: Success highlight — completion pill, active state on success

warning-subtle.comment: Warning faint surface — heads-up banner, soft alert

warning-tinted.comment: Warning highlight — yellow needs slightly higher alpha to read on light bg

info-subtle.comment: Info faint surface — informational banner, neutral tip

info-tinted.comment: Info highlight — pill, badge for info-state

brand-subtle.comment: Brand faint surface — premium / featured row, brand-themed banner. Uses brand.secondary (teal) to avoid colliding with bg.info-* which uses brand.primary (blue).

brand-tinted.comment: Brand highlight — active/selected card surface, brand pill bg. Mirrors selectionGradient and border.selection (teal.600).

focus.comment: Keyboard/focus ring — light theme darkens to blue.600 for WCAG contrast on white

error.comment: Error border — light theme uses darker red for WCAG contrast

selection.comment: Selected-state border (chips, radio) — constant across themes, matches brand.secondary line

primary.comment: Destructive filled button bg / text on outlined (constant — destructive accent identical across themes)

bg-tinted.comment: Destructive Medium tier bg — split mirrors bg.error-tinted opacities

bg-subtle.comment: Destructive Low-hover / banner bg — split mirrors bg.error-subtle opacities
